markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review marketing performance and align on 2026 content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**LLM traffic is a developer activation signal, not a top-of-funnel driver.** It has a 5x higher conversion rate than organic search but primarily drives high-engagement console sessions, not new signups.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**A new content strategy will pivot to developer-focused content,** inspired by the success of the "Architecture and Intelligence" cluster, which doubled its session cohort size.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [**49 new language pages are drafted and ready for publication,** pending a new "slide box" component from the web dev team (ETA: EOW).](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [**Content publishing will now be prioritized** to focus on refreshing high-value, underperforming articles (e.g., "best of" lists) to reclaim lost traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

## Topics

### LLM Traffic Analysis & Strategic Pivot

  - [**Finding:** LLM traffic is a developer activation signal, not a top-of-funnel driver.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
      - [**High Engagement:** 10 views/session, \~2 min duration, low bounce rate.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [**Primary Destination:** The console, not discovery pages.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [**High Conversion:** 5x higher rate than organic search.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Focus on developer activation and success.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Goal:** Optimize for console engagement and positive sentiment.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a more realistic and effective strategy than treating LLMs as a direct SQL-generating channel.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**Action:** Analyze LLM-engaged traffic vs. a control group to prove its value in driving deeper funnel conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

### Content Performance & New Strategy

  - [**Success:** The "Architecture and Intelligence" content cluster doubled its session cohort size.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [**Significance:** This proves the value of developer-focused content and its ability to attract high-value LLM traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [**New Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [**Focus:** Create more specific, developer-oriented content.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [**Collaboration:** Integrate DevRel (Corey) to align content with learning modules.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [**Expansion:** Prioritize content for specific programming languages and international audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

### Language Pages & Content Pipeline

  - [**Status:** 49 new language pages are drafted in Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Publication is pending a new "slide box" component from the web dev team (ETA: EOW).](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [**Future Enhancements:**](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
      - [Add a consistent benchmark panel to each page.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
      - [Improve internal linking to the main Speech-to-Text product page.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [**Next:** Hasan will provide a template to begin drafting Text-to-Speech language pages.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)

### Content Publishing Process

  - [**Problem:** The current first-in, first-out (FIFO) publishing order in Airtable is not strategic.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [**Solution:** Prioritize refreshing high-value, underperforming articles (e.g., "best of" lists).](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Reclaiming lost traffic from these pages is more efficient than building new traffic from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
      - [**Method:** Update the existing article and change the publish date to signal recency to Google.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

      - [Provide Jose with a prioritized content publishing list.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
      - [Deliver Semrush monthly search volume data for language pages.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [**Hasan:**](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
      - [Provide Erik with the Text-to-Speech language page template.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
      - [Prioritize publishing refresh articles from the new list.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [**Web Dev Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [Deliver the "slide box" component for language pages by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXbGowjwVdUmFbw4Cfg_saM2guGqMzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
